# Stellar Nurseries and New Life
## Scripture
"For we are God's handiwork, created in Christ Jesus to do good works, which God prepared in advance for us to do." - Ephesians 2:10

## Reflection
As we gaze upon the starry night sky, we're reminded of the celestial wonders that birth new stars and planets. Stellar nurseries, like the Orion Nebula, are regions where gas and dust come together to form new stars. Similarly, our lives are like these cosmic nurseries, where God brings together various experiences, talents, and relationships to shape us into the people He intended us to be. Just as a stellar nursery requires the right conditions for star formation, our spiritual growth requires the right environment, nourished by God's Word, prayer, and community.

## Prayer
Dear Heavenly Father, thank you for the beauty and wonder of your creation. Just as stellar nurseries give birth to new stars, we pray that you would nurture our spirits, bringing together the elements necessary for our growth and transformation. Help us to trust in your sovereignty, knowing that you have prepared good works in advance for us to do. May our lives shine like new stars, reflecting your glory and love to a world in need. Amen.
